1.name: The Mortal Lands
1.description: A misty sect compound framed by a ceremonial red-and-gold gate, stone inscription pillars, and weathered guardian statues. Bamboo groves rise beyond the training grounds and pale mountains dissolve into perpetual mist. The air carries the smell of chalk dust and residual qi from years of disciples' practice.

2.name: The Ancient Frontier
2.description: A vast wasteland of cracked orange earth baked to the texture of ancient pottery. Collapsed stone archways and ruined gate structures jut from the desert floor alongside enormous bleached bone remains. A massive corroded cauldron sits at the heart of the ruins — the only structure still standing intact in an otherwise dead landscape.

3.name: The Forbidden Lands
3.description: A forbidden stone corridor lined with ancient guardian statues, their eyes alight with cold green spiritual fire. Beyond the rows of sentinels, a dark palace looms with green-lit torches burning at its sealed threshold. The air is still and heavy with the qi of the long-dead, the silence broken only by the distant resonance of ancient war seals.

4.name: The Origin Depths
4.description: A vast underground cavern lit by twin dragon-head stone pillars flanking a waterfall that cascades into a glowing origin qi pool. Teal crystal formations cluster across the cave walls, casting cool light into the dark. Ancient gnarled roots descend from the ceiling far above, and the air is thick with the overwhelming pressure of primordial earth energy.

5.name: The Void Sea
5.description: A fractured void expanse under a sky of deep magenta, split by jagged energy cracks and floating Dao inscription tablets. A solitary stone gate stands on crumbling ground at the horizon, and a yin-yang symbol drifts overhead in charged silence. The floor is cracked like old clay — the only solid surface in a space that is constantly breaking apart at the edges.

6.name: The Open Heaven
6.realms: Half-Step Open Heaven → Open Heaven Layer 6
6.description: A boundless open heaven realm of blinding gold and white, where massive inscription-covered pillars rise from a seamless celestial floor into cloud banks that stretch to infinity. Cranes glide silently through the radiant haze between the pillars. The ambient pressure alone is enough to obliterate anything that has not reached the Open Heaven threshold.

outer_sect_disciple.name: Outer Sect Disciple
outer_sect_disciple.description: A young cultivator in a plain white training robe, wielding a basic wooden practice sword with clumsy but eager stances.

training_golem.name: Training Golem
training_golem.description: A squat clay-and-iron automaton stamped with sect seals, built for durability over damage — its fists are blunted iron spheres.

wolf.name: Pack Wolf
wolf.description: A lean, grey-furred wolf with faintly glowing eyes, suggesting minor qi absorption from years of roaming spirit-rich wilderness.

bandit_scout.name: Bandit Scout
bandit_scout.description: A wiry fighter in rough patchwork armour, carrying a short blade and moving with the practised stealth of someone who survives by ambush.

wandering_beast.name: Wandering Beast
wandering_beast.description: A large, shaggy four-limbed beast with no fixed territory, its hide scarred from years of roaming dangerous wilderness.

rogue_disciple.name: Rogue Disciple
rogue_disciple.description: A former sect member in a tattered and stained cultivation robe, bearing the scars of forbidden qi techniques and the look of someone with nothing left to lose.

iron_fang_wolf.name: Iron Fang Wolf
iron_fang_wolf.description: A massive wolf with iron-density fangs and a hide hardened by years of mineral qi absorption from roaming the ancient plains.

iron_spine_boar.name: Iron Spine Boar
iron_spine_boar.description: A stocky, aggressive boar whose dorsal quills have calcified into iron-hard spines from grazing on mineral-rich flatlands. Charges head-down with reckless force.

sand_dragon.name: Sand Dragon
sand_dragon.description: A serpentine dragon with sun-bleached, razor-edged scales that flows through desert sands like water. Ambushes prey by erupting from below, trailing a spray of sand.

bone_construct.name: Bone Construct
bone_construct.description: An animated war machine assembled from the fused bones of fallen immortals, bound together by residual battle qi and rusted array seals. Found wherever ancient dead litter the land.

city_guardian.name: City Guardian Construct
city_guardian.description: A towering humanoid construct of black iron and jade bearing the crest of the Sunken Immortal City, still faithfully patrolling the waterlogged halls of its long-dead charge.

immortal_shade.name: Trapped Immortal Shade
immortal_shade.description: The spectral remnant of an immortal cultivator trapped when the city sank beneath the earth. Its form flickers between solid and ghost-like, bound eternally by an unfinished vow.

corrupted_cultivator.name: Corrupted Cultivator
corrupted_cultivator.description: A former sect disciple whose qi cultivation devoured their sanity. Their robe is shredded, their meridians visibly blackened beneath the skin, their eyes blank with qi-madness.

blood_leviathan.name: Blood Sea Leviathan
blood_leviathan.description: A colossal sea beast whose scales have turned deep crimson from centuries feeding in the Blood Sea. It trails caustic red vapour as it moves and strikes with its entire mass.

burial_guardian.name: Burial Guardian
burial_guardian.description: A hulking armoured soldier whose soul was bound to the burial grounds as an eternal sentinel. Its ancient armour is ornate but corroded, and it moves with the unnatural stillness of something that has not rested in centuries.

saint_corpse_soldier.name: Saint Corpse-Soldier
saint_corpse_soldier.description: The perfectly preserved corpse of a Saint-realm warrior, still in battle armour and clutching its weapon in a death grip. Oath-binding seals glow on its chest, compelling it forward regardless of damage taken.

void_rift_predator.name: Void Rift Predator
void_rift_predator.description: A creature born inside rift tears, its body partially phased between dimensions. Strikes from unexpected angles as it slips between solid and void space.

rift_stalker.name: Rift Stalker
rift_stalker.description: A leaner, faster predator of the rift ecosystem. Hunts by tracking qi signatures through dimensional boundaries and ambushes from within the rift itself.

saint_bone_sovereign.name: Saint Bone Sovereign
saint_bone_sovereign.description: The reanimated skeleton of a Saint-realm sovereign, its authority over death qi absolute. It claims the mountain range as territory and commands lesser undead from atop the passes.

void_shade.name: Void Shade
void_shade.description: A shadow entity from the void that clings to cursed mountain passes. It has no physical form, only a silhouette of concentrated void energy that drains qi on contact.

forbidden_construct.name: Forbidden Construct
forbidden_construct.description: A towering war automaton sealed inside the altar for centuries, maintaining vigil over the sealed inscriptions. Its activation was forbidden — until you crossed the threshold.

ancient_war_spirit.name: Ancient War Spirit
ancient_war_spirit.description: The bound spirit of a warrior sealed into the altar during an ancient war. Still clutching the cause it died for, its fury remains undimmed by the centuries.

origin_guardian.name: Origin Guardian
origin_guardian.description: A colossal humanoid formed from compressed origin qi, permanently stationed at the depths' entrance. Its body radiates crushing primordial pressure with every step.

origin_crystal_golem.name: Origin Crystal Golem
origin_crystal_golem.description: A golem built from crystal formations that grew inside the origin qi spring. Its strikes release bursts of raw primordial energy from the crystals embedded in its fists.

primordial_serpent.name: Primordial Serpent
primordial_serpent.description: An enormous serpent that has hunted the World Root Caverns since the age before records. Its scales have hardened to the density of world-stone over millennia of mineral absorption.

cavern_elder_demon.name: Cavern Elder Demon
cavern_elder_demon.description: A demon that has fused with the cavern over countless centuries, its body partially made of stone and root. It barely distinguishes itself from the cave walls until it moves.

forest_spirit.name: Forest Spirit
forest_spirit.description: A luminous spirit drifting through the root hollows, drawn to the concentrated world energy in the ancient roots. Normally passive — dangerous when disturbed.

root_sovereign.name: Root Sovereign
root_sovereign.description: The dominant force of the root network, a massive entity whose body is woven from the thickest roots of the world tree. Territorial to an extreme, it regards all intruders as parasites.

ancient_beast.name: Ancient Beast
ancient_beast.description: A beast so old it predates the current age of cultivation. Its instincts are sharpened to perfection and its body carries the weight of a hundred thousand years of survival.

world_root_wraith.name: World Root Wraith
world_root_wraith.description: An ethereal guardian manifested from the life-force of the world tree's roots. It phases through the root network to intercept anything that threatens the forest core.

deep_earth_titan.name: Deep Earth Titan
deep_earth_titan.description: The sole guardian of the Ancient Origin Altar — an entity of such mass that its footsteps crack bedrock. No other creature survives within range of its pressure field.

spatial_fissure_beast.name: Spatial Fissure Beast
spatial_fissure_beast.description: A creature native to the fractured space corridors, its body adapted to exist in partially collapsed dimensions. It uses the fissures as hunting grounds.

qi_beast.name: Qi-Sensing Beast
qi_beast.description: A void-adapted predator that hunts entirely by qi signature. Blind to physical camouflage, it can track a cultivator across dimensional boundaries.

void_elemental.name: Void Elemental
void_elemental.description: A pure manifestation of void energy that coalesced in the fractured corridors. It has no body, only a concentrated mass of negating force.

void_sea_leviathan.name: Void Sea Leviathan
void_sea_leviathan.description: A titanic sea beast that has adapted to the void sea's lack of water, swimming through pure spatial energy. Its mass is so great it pushes dimensional boundaries aside.

dao_inscription_guardian.name: Dao Inscription Guardian
dao_inscription_guardian.description: A construct bound to the ruins by inscription arrays, endlessly maintaining the Dao tablets it was built to protect. It attacks anything that interferes with the inscriptions.

dao_inscription_revenant.name: Dao Inscription Revenant
dao_inscription_revenant.description: The remnant of a scholar who died attempting to decode the Dao tablets. Their consciousness was absorbed into the inscription arrays and now serves as an aggressive guardian.

emperor_will_fragment.name: Emperor Will Fragment
emperor_will_fragment.description: A shard of an ancient emperor's dying will, still carrying enough authority to manifest as a semi-physical force. It attacks intruders reflexively, protecting the tomb by instinct.

petrified_dao_lord.name: Petrified Dao Lord
petrified_dao_lord.description: A Dao Lord sealed inside the emperor's tomb as a final line of defence. Its body has turned to stone but its Dao comprehension remains intact — it fights with pure principle.

star_sea_drifter.name: Star Sea Drifter
star_sea_drifter.description: An entity pulled from the star sea by the catastrophic Dao convergence at Heaven Sword Ridge. It hunts alone, disoriented and aggressive, far from its native void.

heaven_pillar_guardian.name: Heaven Pillar Guardian
heaven_pillar_guardian.description: A celestial sentinel bound to the inscription pillars of the Open Heaven realm, maintaining the boundary between realms. It does not negotiate passage.

boundary_wraith.name: Boundary Wraith
boundary_wraith.description: A wraith formed from the residual spiritual pressure of realm boundaries. It drifts at the threshold of the Open Heaven, preying on cultivators who linger at the ascent.

open_heaven_beast.name: Open Heaven Beast
open_heaven_beast.description: A beast native to the Open Heaven realm, its body saturated with heaven-grade qi from birth. Even its resting state exerts pressure comparable to a peak Emperor Realm cultivator.

star_sea_leviathan.name: Star Sea Leviathan
star_sea_leviathan.description: A leviathan from the star sea that has entered the Open Heaven realm through a collapsed boundary. Its scale dwarfs anything from the mortal world.

celestial_sovereign.name: Celestial Sovereign
celestial_sovereign.description: A sovereign of the Open Heaven realm, commanding a domain of the Celestial Rift. Its authority over spatial energy is absolute within its territory.

eternal_storm_titan.name: Eternal Storm Titan
eternal_storm_titan.description: A natural force given form by the rift's perpetual storms. It has no consciousness — only the endless violent energy of celestial weather made manifest.

open_heaven_sovereign.name: Open Heaven Sovereign
open_heaven_sovereign.description: The apex ruler of the Open Heaven realm, its Dao comprehension beyond anything achievable in the mortal world. Encountering it is the final test of ascension.

void_apex_predator.name: Void Apex Predator
void_apex_predator.description: The ultimate predator of the void, having survived the collapse of multiple realms. It hunts celestial sovereigns for sport and regards ascendant cultivators as prey.

iron_herb_1.name: Sect Grounds Grass
iron_herb_1.desc: A weed that grows wherever mortal cultivators train, soaking up residual qi from sect grounds.

iron_herb_2.name: Borderland Root
iron_herb_2.desc: A gnarled root found in borderland wilderness, drawn to faint spiritual energy in the soil.

bronze_herb_1.name: Qi Vein Vine
bronze_herb_1.desc: A creeping vine that grows along underground qi veins, its leaves faintly luminescent.

bronze_herb_2.name: Spirit Forest Bloom
bronze_herb_2.desc: A pale flower that blooms only in the Misty Spirit Forest, pollinated by forest spirits.

silver_herb_1.name: Shattered Sky Lotus
silver_herb_1.desc: A silver lotus that survives in the Shattered Sky Desert ruins, drawing water from deep ley lines.

silver_herb_2.name: Blood Sea Reed
silver_herb_2.desc: A blood-red reed that grows at the edges of the blood sea, its sap thick with corrupted vitality.

gold_herb_1.name: Saint Burial Lotus
gold_herb_1.desc: A dark lotus that blooms only above saint-grade burial sites, feeding on centuries of death qi.

gold_herb_2.name: Void Thorn Vine
gold_herb_2.desc: A thorned vine that grows through rift cracks, its barbs sharp enough to pierce saint-grade defenses.

transcendent_herb_1.name: Origin Spring Petal
transcendent_herb_1.desc: A petal shed by flowers growing at the world's origin qi springs, saturated with primordial energy.

transcendent_herb_2.name: Open Heaven Vine
transcendent_herb_2.desc: A legendary vine whose roots reach up into the Open Heaven realm itself, channeling heaven-grade energy.

iron_mineral_1.name: Sect Iron Shard
iron_mineral_1.desc: A fragment of iron-grade material shed from sect constructs, training equipment, and the iron of mortal cultivators.

iron_mineral_2.name: Iron Vein Shard
iron_mineral_2.desc: A dense shard of iron ore extracted from shallow veins, used in basic transmutation.

bronze_mineral_1.name: Qi Fang
bronze_mineral_1.desc: A fang or spine shard from a beast that grew mineral-dense through years of absorbing qi from the earth.

bronze_mineral_2.name: Spirit Wood Core
bronze_mineral_2.desc: The hardened core from a spirit entity or ancient tree, permeated with concentrated forest qi.

silver_mineral_1.name: Iron Spine Scale
silver_mineral_1.desc: A scale or spine segment from iron-calibre predators of the ancient frontier, dense enough to deflect silver-grade attacks.

silver_mineral_2.name: Immortal Array Jade
silver_mineral_2.desc: Jade infused with formation arrays from sunken immortal ruins, still containing traces of their original inscriptions.

gold_mineral_1.name: Saint Bone Sliver
gold_mineral_1.desc: A sliver of bone from saint-realm corpses, radiating a cold death qi that resists refinement.

gold_mineral_2.name: Forbidden Seal Shard
gold_mineral_2.desc: A fragment of the void seals that once contained the Forbidden Lands, crackling with restrained power.

transcendent_mineral_1.name: Void Crystal
transcendent_mineral_1.desc: A crystal grown inside rift tears, its structure formed entirely by compressed void energy.

transcendent_mineral_2.name: World Stone Core
transcendent_mineral_2.desc: An impossibly dense stone core formed at the world's deepest strata or shed by titans of the upper heaven, used only in the most advanced transmutation.

iron_cultivation_1.name: Iron QI Stone 1
iron_cultivation_1.desc: A naturally formed stone that accumulates ambient qi over time in mortal-realm training grounds.

iron_cultivation_2.name: Iron QI Stone 2
iron_cultivation_2.desc: Residual qi that coalesces above a defeated mortal cultivator or beast, briefly visible before dispersing.

bronze_cultivation_1.name: Bronze QI Stone 1
bronze_cultivation_1.desc: The dense qi nucleus found at the center of a beast that has fed on spiritual energy for years — still pulsing faintly after death.

bronze_cultivation_2.name: Bronze QI Stone 2
bronze_cultivation_2.desc: A crystallised shard of qi torn from a fallen cultivator or construct whose energy pathways had been corrupted or shattered.

silver_cultivation_1.name: Silver QI Stone 1
silver_cultivation_1.desc: The marrow-like qi condensate found deep within ancient frontier creatures, saturated after centuries of qi absorption.

silver_cultivation_2.name: Silver QI Stone 2
silver_cultivation_2.desc: A fragment of soul-force that persists after the death of an immortal-grade entity, still carrying echoes of its cultivation.

gold_cultivation_1.name: Gold QI Stone 1
gold_cultivation_1.desc: A calcified relic of saint-realm qi, recovered from burial grounds and war altars.

gold_cultivation_2.name: Gold QI Stone 2
gold_cultivation_2.desc: A small pearl formed inside void-touched predators and shades, containing compressed void-attribute energy.

transcendent_cultivation_1.name: Transcendent QI Stone 1
transcendent_cultivation_1.desc: The crystallised qi core of a primordial entity — condensed from millions of years of unbroken cultivation.

transcendent_cultivation_2.name: Transcendent QI Stone 2
transcendent_cultivation_2.desc: A crystal of pure heaven-grade qi extracted from entities that have ascended beyond mortal limitations.

iron_essence_pill.name: Iron Essence Pill
iron_essence_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_soul_pill.name: Iron Soul Pill
iron_soul_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_body_pill.name: Iron Body Pill
iron_body_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_fist_pill.name: Iron Fist Pill
iron_fist_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_ember_pill.name: Iron Ember Pill
iron_ember_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_mind_pill.name: Iron Mind Pill
iron_mind_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_skin_pill.name: Iron Skin Pill
iron_skin_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_ward_pill.name: Iron Ward Pill
iron_ward_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_anchor_pill.name: Iron Anchor Pill
iron_anchor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

iron_vigor_pill.name: Iron Vigor Pill
iron_vigor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_essence_pill.name: Bronze Essence Pill
bronze_essence_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_soul_pill.name: Bronze Soul Pill
bronze_soul_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_body_pill.name: Bronze Body Pill
bronze_body_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_fist_pill.name: Bronze Fist Pill
bronze_fist_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_ember_pill.name: Bronze Ember Pill
bronze_ember_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_mind_pill.name: Bronze Mind Pill
bronze_mind_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_skin_pill.name: Bronze Skin Pill
bronze_skin_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_ward_pill.name: Bronze Ward Pill
bronze_ward_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_anchor_pill.name: Bronze Anchor Pill
bronze_anchor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

bronze_vigor_pill.name: Bronze Vigor Pill
bronze_vigor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_essence_pill.name: Silver Essence Pill
silver_essence_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_soul_pill.name: Silver Soul Pill
silver_soul_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_body_pill.name: Silver Body Pill
silver_body_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_fist_pill.name: Silver Fist Pill
silver_fist_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_ember_pill.name: Silver Ember Pill
silver_ember_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_mind_pill.name: Silver Mind Pill
silver_mind_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_skin_pill.name: Silver Skin Pill
silver_skin_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_ward_pill.name: Silver Ward Pill
silver_ward_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_anchor_pill.name: Silver Anchor Pill
silver_anchor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

silver_vigor_pill.name: Silver Vigor Pill
silver_vigor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_essence_pill.name: Gold Essence Pill
gold_essence_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_soul_pill.name: Gold Soul Pill
gold_soul_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_body_pill.name: Gold Body Pill
gold_body_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_fist_pill.name: Gold Fist Pill
gold_fist_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_ember_pill.name: Gold Ember Pill
gold_ember_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_mind_pill.name: Gold Mind Pill
gold_mind_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_skin_pill.name: Gold Skin Pill
gold_skin_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_ward_pill.name: Gold Ward Pill
gold_ward_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_anchor_pill.name: Gold Anchor Pill
gold_anchor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

gold_vigor_pill.name: Gold Vigor Pill
gold_vigor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves base stats.

transcendent_essence_pill.name: Transcendent Essence Pill
transcendent_essence_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves all three primary stats.

exploit_mastery_pill.name: Exploit Mastery Pill
exploit_mastery_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves exploit chance and damage.

world_harvest_pill.name: World Harvest Pill
world_harvest_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves gathering and mining speed and luck.

cataclysm_pill.name: Cataclysm Pill
cataclysm_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves all damage types.

dao_bulwark_pill.name: Dao Bulwark Pill
dao_bulwark_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently improves all defense types.

eternal_vigor_pill.name: Eternal Vigor Pill
eternal_vigor_pill.desc: A cultivated pill that permanently grants a massive amount of health.

iron_blood_core_1.name: Iron Blood Core 1
iron_blood_core_1.desc: Placeholder — a dense iron-grade blood core extracted from a fallen enemy.

iron_blood_core_2.name: Iron Blood Core 2
iron_blood_core_2.desc: Placeholder — a crystallised iron-grade blood essence condensed from mortal cultivators.

bronze_blood_core_1.name: Bronze Blood Core 1
bronze_blood_core_1.desc: Placeholder — a bronze-grade blood core pulsing with beast vitality.

bronze_blood_core_2.name: Bronze Blood Core 2
bronze_blood_core_2.desc: Placeholder — a shard of condensed bronze-grade blood qi from corrupted entities.

silver_blood_core_1.name: Silver Blood Core 1
silver_blood_core_1.desc: Placeholder — a silver-grade blood core saturated with ancient frontier vitality.

silver_blood_core_2.name: Silver Blood Core 2
silver_blood_core_2.desc: Placeholder — a remnant blood crystal from an immortal-realm entity.

gold_blood_core_1.name: Gold Blood Core 1
gold_blood_core_1.desc: Placeholder — a saint-grade blood core radiating cold death qi.

gold_blood_core_2.name: Gold Blood Core 2
gold_blood_core_2.desc: Placeholder — a void-attribute blood pearl from a gold-grade predator.

transcendent_blood_core_1.name: Transcendent Blood Core 1
transcendent_blood_core_1.desc: Placeholder — a primordial blood core condensed from an entity beyond mortal limitations.

transcendent_blood_core_2.name: Transcendent Blood Core 2
transcendent_blood_core_2.desc: Placeholder — a heaven-grade blood crystal radiating overwhelming pressure.

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.desc: A plain iron sword forged for outer sect disciples. Reliable but unremarkable.

spirit_edge_sword.name: Spirit-Edge Sword
spirit_edge_sword.desc: A sword honed with spirit energy; the blade hums faintly when qi flows through it.

void_cleaver.name: Void Cleaver
void_cleaver.desc: Forged from void stone; each strike tears a hairline crack in the local spatial fabric.

dragon_fang_sword.name: Dragon Fang Sword
dragon_fang_sword.desc: Crafted from a dragon beast fang; channels raw draconic pressure into every blow.

heaven_slaying_sword.name: Heaven-Slaying Sword
heaven_slaying_sword.desc: A legendary blade said to have cut through the barrier between realms. The edge never dulls.

iron_polearm.name: Iron Polearm
iron_polearm.desc: A heavy iron polearm favoured by body-cultivators for its reach and stopping power.

serpent_spear.name: Serpent Spear
serpent_spear.desc: A flexible spear with a serpent-tooth tip that injects a mild spiritual venom on penetration.

mountain_breaker.name: Mountain Breaker
mountain_breaker.desc: A broad-headed halberd said to have felled a small spirit mountain. Pulverises physical defence.

thunder_lance.name: Thunder Lance
thunder_lance.desc: A lance coated in compressed lightning ore; strikes detonate with a thunderclap.

divine_pillar_spear.name: Divine Pillar Spear
divine_pillar_spear.desc: Once a pillar of a heavenly palace, reshaped into a spear. A full-power thrust tears space.

spirit_headband.name: Spirit Headband
spirit_headband.desc: A simple cloth band imbued with basic spiritual energy, aiding focus during cultivation.

jade_cultivation_crown.name: Jade Cultivation Crown
jade_cultivation_crown.desc: A carved jade circlet that stabilizes the spiritual sea and reduces breakthrough turbulence.

ghost_kings_circlet.name: Ghost King's Circlet
ghost_kings_circlet.desc: Forged from ghost iron; dulls spiritual attacks and suppresses soul-based debuffs.

heaven_forged_war_crown.name: Heaven-Forged War Crown
heaven_forged_war_crown.desc: A battle crown smelted in heavenly fire; greatly increases resistance to elemental damage.

crown_of_the_undying.name: Crown of the Undying
crown_of_the_undying.desc: Said to have been worn by an Open Heaven cultivator; protects the spirit from lethal soul attacks.

cotton_spirit_robe.name: Cotton Spirit Robe
cotton_spirit_robe.desc: Lightweight robe woven with spirit thread, providing minimal but consistent qi circulation.

cloud_silk_battle_vest.name: Cloud Silk Battle Vest
cloud_silk_battle_vest.desc: A vest spun from high-altitude cloud silk that deflects minor physical and elemental strikes.

dragon_scale_armour.name: Dragon Scale Armour
dragon_scale_armour.desc: Scales shed by a lesser dragon beast; hard as iron and resistant to fire and lightning.

phoenix_feather_war_robe.name: Phoenix Feather War Robe
phoenix_feather_war_robe.desc: Woven from phoenix down; regenerates minor damage over time and resists extreme heat.

heaven_piercing_divine_robe.name: Heaven-Piercing Divine Robe
heaven_piercing_divine_robe.desc: A supreme-grade robe that shifts between softness and steel; nullifies strikes below a power threshold.

iron_bracers.name: Iron Bracers
iron_bracers.desc: Basic iron bracers that reinforce the forearms and improve blocking stability.

tiger_claw_gauntlets.name: Tiger Claw Gauntlets
tiger_claw_gauntlets.desc: Gauntlets styled after tiger claws; slightly increases the damage of unarmed and polearm strikes.

mithril_bracers.name: Mithril Bracers
mithril_bracers.desc: Lightweight mithril bracers that conduct elemental energy through each strike.

dragon_vein_gauntlets.name: Dragon Vein Gauntlets
dragon_vein_gauntlets.desc: Gauntlets threaded with dragon-vein ore; amplify Essence-based attacks channelled through the hands.

heaven_palm_guards.name: Heaven Palm Guards
heaven_palm_guards.desc: Ancient guards worn by a palm-technique grandmaster; dramatically amplify open-palm secret techniques.

leather_cultivation_belt.name: Leather Cultivation Belt
leather_cultivation_belt.desc: A sturdy belt that stabilizes the dantian and reduces qi dispersal during combat.

spirit_jade_sash.name: Spirit Jade Sash
spirit_jade_sash.desc: A silk sash inlaid with spirit jade beads; improves qi circulation between upper and lower body.

serpent_skin_belt.name: Serpent Skin Belt
serpent_skin_belt.desc: Crafted from the shed skin of a spiritual serpent; increases agility and resistance to poison.

golden_dragon_belt.name: Golden Dragon Belt
golden_dragon_belt.desc: A broad belt embossed with a coiling dragon; greatly increases Body-stat conversion.

void_emperors_sash.name: Void Emperor's Sash
void_emperors_sash.desc: A sash woven from spatial thread; absorbs a portion of incoming damage into a void pocket.

wind_step_boots.name: Wind-Step Boots
wind_step_boots.desc: Light boots enchanted for swift footwork; marginally increases dodge rate.

swiftcloud_sandals.name: Swiftcloud Sandals
swiftcloud_sandals.desc: Sandals that carry a trace of cloud energy; allow brief bursts of accelerated movement.

thunderstep_boots.name: Thunderstep Boots
thunderstep_boots.desc: Boots crackling with stored lightning; each step releases a low-power shock on contact.

dragon_treading_boots.name: Dragon Treading Boots
dragon_treading_boots.desc: Forged from dragon beast bones; dramatically improves ground stability and stomp attacks.

heaven_soaring_sandals.name: Heaven-Soaring Sandals
heaven_soaring_sandals.desc: Sandals said to let the wearer walk on air; massively boost dodge and movement-based techniques.

jade_spirit_pendant.name: Jade Spirit Pendant
jade_spirit_pendant.desc: A smoothed jade piece worn close to the heart; gently strengthens the spiritual sea.

soul_calming_necklace.name: Soul Calming Necklace
soul_calming_necklace.desc: A string of spirit beads that suppresses soul fluctuations and mental debuffs in combat.

blood_dragon_talisman.name: Blood Dragon Talisman
blood_dragon_talisman.desc: A carved bone talisman soaked in dragon beast blood; increases raw physical resistance.

elemental_core_pendant.name: Elemental Core Pendant
elemental_core_pendant.desc: Contains a compressed elemental core; amplifies the elemental affinity bonus.

heavens_eye_amulet.name: Heaven's Eye Amulet
heavens_eye_amulet.desc: A talisman housing the petrified eye of a divine beast; grants brief precognition in combat.

copper_spirit_ring.name: Copper Spirit Ring
copper_spirit_ring.desc: A plain copper ring that channels a faint qi current through the meridians.

jade_focus_ring.name: Jade Focus Ring
jade_focus_ring.desc: A carved jade ring that sharpens elemental technique control, reducing wasted energy.

void_stone_ring.name: Void Stone Ring
void_stone_ring.desc: Set with a void stone fragment; has a small storage space and boosts spatial-technique damage.

dragon_blood_ring.name: Dragon Blood Ring
dragon_blood_ring.desc: A ring forged with dragon blood alloy; significantly boosts Essence and Body stats.

immortal_soul_ring.name: Immortal Soul Ring
immortal_soul_ring.desc: A ring said to contain a sliver of an immortal's soul; dramatically boosts all three primary stats.

raging_fire_slash.name: Raging Fire Slash
raging_fire_slash.flavour: A blade wreathed in living fire, forged from fury alone.

passives.Ignite: Applies a burn dealing 5% dmg/s for 3s.

void_piercer.name: Void Piercer
void_piercer.flavour: A thrust so precise it tears space itself.

twin_dragons_rage.name: Twin Dragon's Rage
twin_dragons_rage.flavour: Two dragons roar as one — heaven itself trembles.

mending_breath.name: Mending Breath
mending_breath.flavour: A single exhale restores what years of battle have worn away.

heaven_mending_art.name: Heaven Mending Art
heaven_mending_art.flavour: Even shattered meridians knit themselves whole.

passives.Heaven's Will: Can overheal up to 120% max HP.
passives.Soul Mending: Restores a portion of Soul stat.

stone_skin.name: Stone Skin
stone_skin.flavour: Flesh becomes iron. Iron becomes stone.

iron_fortress.name: Iron Fortress
iron_fortress.flavour: A citadel of qi — no blow can shake its walls.

passives.Unbreakable: Cannot be reduced below 1 HP while active.

phantom_step.name: Phantom Step
phantom_step.flavour: Between one heartbeat and the next — you are elsewhere.

shadow_walk.name: Shadow Walk
shadow_walk.flavour: The shadow peels away and becomes you for a precious moment.

passives.Phase Shift: First attack after dodge deals ×1.5 dmg.

three_harmony_manual.name: Three Harmony Manual
three_harmony_manual.flavour: The ancient text speaks of no fire, no storm, no mountain — only the even breath between all things.
